x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose account or credit facility earns or is charged interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that calculates, applies, and manages interest on deposits, loans, or other financial products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee interest practices, ensuring compliance with laws, rates, and disclosure requirements.
